sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Man neilo hi bang leel kei nuntak sung,
Iplahna them zong neilo bang ah
Topa maipha muh nang semzolo pi’n,
Hizahta nong it ma’n nuam lua ing.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tu’n nanga hi ta’ng hong Gumpa aw,
Tubansiah nang thu hi ta’ng ka To Zeisu,
Bangbang piang ta zong hong phat den ni’ng,
Nang lo-in bang mah tangtun zo ke’ng

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ze-etna namkim in kei hong tuam hang,
Lungmuang ta’ng, To Zeisu’n hong do sak,
Simmawh thu’n tamvei hong kinelhsiah zong,
Gualzo ka To Zeisu min phat ta’ng.
